hero.subtitle: Full-stack engineer
hero.statement: I build products end to end, from the database to the screen. Lately that's been tax and compliance software for the Dominican market.

about.p1: I grew up taking things apart to see how they worked, and I build software the same way. I start with the problem and the people who actually have it, and let that decide the rest.
about.p2: Most of what I build deals with messy real-world rules like taxes, compliance, and internal operations, where getting the small details right matters more than the tech stack. I also help my team adopt AI tools in a way that actually pays off, and I mentor the junior developers around me.

practice.title: How I work with AI
practice.intro: Picking technologies is table stakes now. With the right workflow anyone can ship in any stack. What sets the work apart is the system I build around the model, so I can take a brief and deliver a finished product fast without dropping quality.

prd.title: From PRD to shipped product
prd.body: Hand me a brief or a PRD and I deliver the whole thing: data model, backend, API, and a UI that non-technical people can actually use. Written research and a plan go in, a working product and a QA guide come out, with little back-and-forth.

quality.title: Quality is enforced, not hoped for
quality.body: Every project carries codified rules and edit hooks. Each change typechecks, lints, and validates the schema before it lands, so a type error or a stray console.log never reaches a commit.

models.title: The right model for the job
models.body: I split work across AI models, deep reasoning to plan and fast models to execute, so delivery stays fast without trading away rigor.

exp1.title: Full-Stack AI Engineer,
exp1.desc: I own products end to end, from the data model to the frontend. I build a commercial financial-management platform that we sell to clients, including multi-currency budgeting with approval workflows, and I keep maintaining and extending it as it grows. I also take on the harder integrations, like payment providers such as Lemon Squeezy. On top of that, I lead how the team adopts AI tools like Claude Code, and I mentor our interns and junior developers.

exp2.title: Software Developer,
exp2.desc: I helped build a shared design system used across the company's products, tuned the app's data layers so the interface felt faster and more responsive, and mentored junior developers.

contact.subtitle: Have a project, or just want to connect? My inbox is open.

404.title: 404 - Page not found
404.heading: Oops! Page not found
404.description: The page you're looking for seems to have gone on an adventure. Let's get you back on track!

reasons.title: This might have happened because:
reasons.typo: There's a typo in the URL
reasons.moved: The page has been moved or deleted
